reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para descansar un rato, tiene mesas, bancos, tachos de basura, baños impecables y MUCHOS PERRITOS!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Lovely place to relax for a while, it has tables, benches, trash cans, spotless bathrooms and LOTS OF DOGS!!!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25GUWFEZEhlRk14TnkxQ1ZFSnFiM1JHUkROcExWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un espanto ña atencion, para a cargar combustible, quise cargar  agua caliente, me vendieron una ficha,a,800 pesos, y el agua,era,salada,intomable. De lo peor de las estaciones YPF DEL PAIS

(Translated by Google)
The service was appalling. When I stopped to get fuel, I wanted to get hot water, they sold me a token for 800 pesos, and the water was salty and undrinkable. One of the worst YPF stations in the country.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xneVVrOWhhM0EyVkhSZlRqQlNXa2hLYlUxUVJWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre es un placer detenerse en este ACA a almorzar, cenar o tomar un café! Excelente atención!

(Translated by Google)
It's always a pleasure to stop by this ACA for lunch, dinner, or a coffee! Excellent service!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21aSVYxTXlVelJrUjA4eWNtVmpObkpVTWpCdFkzYxAB

reviews.comment:
El día 16 de Junio quise cargar nafta y solo aceptaban efectivo no tenían débito una pena que el ACÁ haga esto con los clientes les reclame y encima me trataron bastante mal no vuelvo mas

(Translated by Google)
On June 16th, I wanted to fill up with gas and they only accepted cash, no debit cards. It's a shame that ACÁ treats its customers this way. I complained and they treated me quite badly. I won't be back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tsTFRWaFlWMUEzYkRkZlFVZ3dPR2RJTWpOVVJIYxAB
